---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Felix Ramirez Mota"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library("readxl")
library(ggplot2)

mass_arrests <- read_excel("/Users/felixramirez/Desktop/DACSS_690V/DACSS_690V-HW3/Mass_Arrests.xlsx")

covid <- read.csv("/Users/felixramirez/Desktop/DACSS_690V/DACSS_690V-HW3/covid-19.csv")



```

## Ethnicity and Arrest Type Plot

```{r}
str(mass_arrests)

eth_arresttype <- table(mass_arrests$Ethnicity, mass_arrests$`Arrest Type`)
eth_arresttype_mgCol <- round(prop.table(eth_arresttype, margin = 2), 3)
eth_arresttypeDF <- as.data.frame(eth_arresttype)
names(eth_arresttypeDF) <- c("Ethnicity", "Arrest Type", "Counts")
eth_arresttypeDF$pct <- 100*as.data.frame(eth_arresttype_mgCol)[,3]
eth_arresttypeDF

```

### Plot 1

```{r}
topdata <- eth_arresttypeDF[eth_arresttypeDF$Ethnicity %in% names(sort(table(mass_arrests$Ethnicity), decreasing = TRUE)) [1:15],]
ggplot(data = topdata, aes(x = `Arrest Type`, y = reorder(Ethnicity,pct), fill = pct))+
  geom_tile()+
  labs(
    title = "Arrest Type Distribution by Ethnicity",
    subtitle = "Massachussets Arrest Data",
    x = "Arrest Type",
    y = "Ethnic Group",
    fill = "Ethnicity",
  ) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.6),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue")
```
